agent_file.note: Claude Code reads CLAUDE.md not AGENTS.md. Global config at ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md. Also reads project-level CLAUDE.md files walking up from CWD.

rules.note: Rules files are auto-loaded every session. Supports globs: frontmatter for path-scoped rules. ~/.claude/rules/ is currently symlinked to primitives/rules/.

skills.note: Loaded on demand via Skill tool. ~/.claude/skills/ is symlinked to primitives/skills/.

commands.note: Filename becomes slash command. ~/.claude/commands/ is symlinked to primitives/commands/.

custom_tools.native_name: Bash-invoked scripts (no native registration — surfaced via rules files)
custom_tools.note: Claude Code has no custom tool registration outside MCP. Non-MCP tools like scratchpad must be invoked via Bash and surfaced via a companion rules file.

hooks.native_name: hooks in ~/.claude/settings.json (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Notification, Stop, PreCompact)
hooks.note: Shell script hooks. Configured as JSON in settings.json with matcher + command array.
hooks.verify: python3 -c "import json,os; s=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/settings.json'))); exit(0 if s.get('hooks') else 1)"

mcp_servers.note: HTTP and stdio transports supported. Project-scoped MCPs via .mcp.json in project root.
mcp_servers.verify: python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude.json'))); exit(0 if d.get('mcpServers') else 1)"

subagents.native_name: agents/ directory (.md files, invoked via Agent tool)

plugins.note: Claude Code plugin system. Currently 5 plugins installed.
